title: EPISODE 1: Dating Is Different When You’re Filipino
description: In our very first episode, Damarise and Malaya, UBC Kababayan’s very own cultural directors, sit down to talk about love, dating, and all the ways being Filipino makes loving different. We cover traditional courting, family involvement, and the cultural rules that somehow always show up in our relationships. For anyone who’s ever had to balance modern dating with traditional values, this conversation is just for you. Your titas already have opinions. Listen in, anyways.
